name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help improve facelapse
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Command or code that triggered the issue
2. Input data characteristics (if relevant)
3. Config settings (if non-default)

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened. Include error messages and stack traces.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11]
- facelapse version: [e.g. 0.1.0]
- Installation method: [pip install -e . or other]

## Funnel stage counts (if applicable)
If the issue is with filtering/selection, paste the stage pass/fail counts:
```
[paste output here]
```

## Additional context
Any other context about the problem.
